meaning: n.扣件,纽扣,按钮,使系牢之物
examples: This cool towel does not employ the use of any fastener.
They have a quick-release fastener provided with thread.
The Swedish engineer who invented the zip fastener made a greater intellectual leap than many scientists do in a lifetime.
Ammunition was sold outdoors, in cartons, as in the fastener aisle of a hardware store.
The man who invented the zip fastener was today honoured with a lifetime peerage.
